name: Investor (cold inbound)
intent_summary: Wants to evaluate Holistika as a potential investment
qualification_gate: Confirm fit (sector / stage / ticket size); request cap-table-friendly intro pack only after first 1-on-1
notes: Initiative 31 seed. Cold investors arrive almost always at N3-N4 via LinkedIn or cold email; first response confirms relevance before investing time.

name: Investor (warm referral)
intent_summary: Same as cold but arrives via referral
qualification_gate: Confirm bridge person; schedule 30 min within 1 week
notes: Warm investors deserve a different template (bridge person referenced; tighter SLA).

name: Advisor (warm referral)
intent_summary: Wants to provide advisory services or refer business
qualification_gate: Confirm reference + scope of advisory ask before scheduling
notes: Existing ENISA pattern: most current adviser engagements arrived via warm referral.

name: Advisor (cold pitch)
intent_summary: Pitches advisory services without prior context
qualification_gate: Polite acknowledgment; no time investment unless they show specific Holistika context
notes: Default response is acknowledgement-and-defer; we do not need cold advisors today.

name: Talent inbound
intent_summary: Wants to join Holistika or collaborate as an ongoing contractor
qualification_gate: Auto-acknowledge in 48h; require a portfolio + 1 written reference; only invite to call when both are present
notes: Talent inbound is the future-traffic anchor when site adds careers page.

name: Vendor (Holistika sources externally)
intent_summary: Holistika seeks hourly-rate professional services
qualification_gate: Brief hand-over via TEMPLATE_OUTBOUND_BRIEF; SLA + payment terms agreed upfront
notes: The 'cheap pro work via clear requirements' pattern. Outbound to anywhere globally; timeframe-agnostic per founder testimony. Cross-references topic_sourcing_register (added in I31 P5).

name: Vendor (pitches Holistika)
intent_summary: Vendor pitches their service unsolicited
qualification_gate: Default low priority; only engage when discipline aligns with current sourcing register need
notes: Vendor inbound is rarely high-value because we want governed sourcing on our terms.

name: Press / journalist
intent_summary: Wants quote or interview
qualification_gate: Brand Manager handles; Founder vetoes if topic is sensitive
notes: Press touchpoint matters for brand surface; treat with care.

name: KiRBe SaaS prospect
intent_summary: Wants to evaluate KiRBe as a knowledge-management platform
qualification_gate: Auto-route to KiRBe trial flow; qualifying questions on size + use-case match
notes: Channel 3 (KiRBe inbound) per CHANNEL_STRATEGY.md.

name: Service prospect
intent_summary: Wants to evaluate Holistika for an applied research / consulting engagement
qualification_gate: 30-min discovery call; scope-shaping document follow-up
notes: Channel 1 (Founder-led direct outbound) plus warm inbound.

name: Partner (joint-equity SaaS pilot)
intent_summary: Wants Holistika to build a SaaS in exchange for equity + revenue share
qualification_gate: 3-of-3 gate per CHANNEL_STRATEGY Channel 6; bridge confirmation if N>1
notes: Initiative 30 Channel 6. Highest demand-signal channel today; needs structured intro pack.

name: Partner (subcontract / Channel 2)
intent_summary: Wants Holistika to deliver engineering for partner's end-clients
qualification_gate: Existing partner pattern; usually arrives with a defined SoW
notes: Channel 2 (Partner B2B Websitz pattern).

name: Idea proposer (warm)
intent_summary: Known person with a project idea looking for execution
qualification_gate: Quick informal exchange first; formalise into joint-equity or subcontract path if it advances
notes: The 'known person with project idea' pattern from operator testimony.

name: Random inbound (catch-all)
intent_summary: Unspecified intent; could be anything
qualification_gate: Acknowledge in 7d; ask qualifying question to bucket into another persona
notes: Catch-all. Re-bucket to a specific persona after 1-2 exchanges.

name: Existing customer (post-sale)
intent_summary: Active customer engagement; renewals + expansion + support
qualification_gate: Default-N1; route per existing engagement playbook
notes: Bidirectional. Customer migrates to N1 once engagement is active.

name: Existing partner (post-engagement)
intent_summary: Active partner engagement; ongoing collaboration
qualification_gate: Default-N1; route per existing partnership playbook
notes: Same posture as existing-customer; both collapse to N1 by definition.

name: Partner business-developer collaborator
intent_summary: External business-development professional who systematically introduces qualified opportunities to Holistika in exchange for revenue share or finder fee — distinct from one-off referrers in PERSONA-PARTNER-JOINT-EQUITY because the collaboration is the relationship structure rather than a single deal
qualification_gate: Confirm prior BD track record + sector overlap + agree commission split before pipeline-warming begins
notes: D-IH-70-AC + D-IH-72-G: business-developer-collaborator surfaced as a persona within the existing partner class (deferred from I70 P8.5 GOI/POI hunt). Distinct from PERSONA-PARTNER-JOINT-EQUITY (single deal pattern) and PERSONA-PARTNER-SUBCONTRACT (delivery pattern). The BD collaborator carries inbound flow + outbound referrals + has agreed commission terms upfront. Cross-references RevOps engagement-template promotion when a BD-driven engagement reaches 3+ instances per D-IH-72-B.

name: Resonance champion (internal advocate at customer/partner org)
intent_summary: Internal champion at an existing or prospective customer/partner organisation who advocates Holistika engagements forward inside their own org — the "warm-lead amplifier" inside a target account, distinct from PERSONA-EXISTING-CUSTOMER (named direct buyer) because they may not be the budget owner
qualification_gate: Confirm internal authority surface + budget-owner identity + Holistika engagement context (existing or prospective)
notes: I72 P5 surfaced via Round 8 Resonance charter authoring. Common pattern: a former colleague + a happy past project sponsor + a vendor-curious team lead. Often arrives via LinkedIn DM after a content piece or speaking event. Routes to Account Management Manager (per ACCOUNT_MANAGEMENT_CHARTER.md) for pipeline qualification + budget-owner identification. Cross-area handoff to Storytelling sub-area for case-study-yield consideration when the champions org becomes a customer.

name: Investor high-craft connoisseur
intent_summary: Wants to evaluate Holistika through concept quality methodology depth founder taste and craft signal
qualification_gate: Confirm senior-fit and concept-craft appetite; route to methodology-led 1-pager after first context exchange; decline if asks for everything-is-possible scope
notes: Wave R+4 C2 research-action row. Sources SRC-WR4-C-01..05 plus SRC-WR4-EF-01..03. Decline-Class is a filter in qualification_gate not a standalone audience.

name: Investor specific-showcase evaluator
intent_summary: Wants one concrete proof surface before considering the broader Holistika thesis
qualification_gate: Ask which showcase matters; route to one narrow proof pack; decline if they demand unrelated demos before stating thesis fit
notes: Wave R+4 C2 research-action row. Maps operator Type-B to persona layer. Avoids overloading AUDIENCE_REGISTRY with subcodes.

name: Investor program-on-radar evaluator
intent_summary: Wants Holistika position on a hot program or market topic backed by research radar and claim-to-expertise
qualification_gate: Confirm topic fit and source bar; route to research-action-backed program note; decline if they only chase trend labels with no decision discipline
notes: Wave R+4 C2 research-action row. Consumes RESEARCH_ACTION_DISCIPLINE before external claims are made.

name: Investor operational-trust evaluator
intent_summary: Wants to trust Holistika can absorb messy work with clear scope boundaries and reliable execution
qualification_gate: Confirm seriousness budget owner and scope boundary; route to operations-readiness brief; decline if they expect unlimited scope or reputation-risk dumping
notes: Wave R+4 C2 research-action row. Renames operator Type-D Dump-And-Trust into external-translated register. Decline-Class remains a cross-persona filter.

name: Investor online-presence seeker
intent_summary: Wants to evaluate Holistika via website LinkedIn founder signal public research outputs and narrative capital
qualification_gate: Confirm whether online presence is evaluation criterion or service ask; route to public-signal roadmap; decline if they equate visibility with vanity metrics only
notes: Wave R+4 C2 research-action row. Informed by Prong D narrative-capital sources SRC-WR4-D-01..05 and brand-propagation matrix.
